title: Caltech researchers say a quantum computer capable of breaching modern cryptography
snippet: Google's Quantum AI team has published a whitepaper on March 30, 2026, titled "Securing Elliptic Curve Cryptocurrencies against Quantum Vulnerabilities," highlighting the urgent need for quantum-resistant security measures.

title: AI attack trends reshape cybersecurity at RSAC 2026
snippet: AI attack trends reshape cybersecurity as RSAC highlights autonomous threats, agentic defense and quantum risks as enterprises build new defenses against evolving AI-powered cyber attacks.

title: Week Ending 4 | 4 | 2026 - Quantum Computing Report
snippet: Latest quantum computing advancements including IQM funding, photonic breakthroughs, post-quantum cryptography guidelines and industry developments shaping the quantum landscape in 2026.

title: RSAC 2026: Rethinking Trust in Agentic AI Security
snippet: Google's quantum research warns that quantum computing could soon break modern cryptographic protections, urging early adoption of post-quantum cryptography standards across industries.

title: Bitcoin Quantum Computing Threat: Coinbase CEO Warns 2029
snippet: Google's quantum AI paper says fewer than 500000 qubits could crack Bitcoin. Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong calls for urgent action on quantum-resistant blockchain security measures.

title: Q-Day Quantum Threat Bitcoin 2026 Explained
snippet: New research from Google and Caltech suggests quantum computers could break Bitcoin's encryption sooner than anyone thought—posing a $711 billion threat to cryptocurrency markets.

title: Microsoft to Invest $10B in AI and Cybersecurity in Japan
snippet: Microsoft announces $10 billion investment in AI and cybersecurity infrastructure development in Japan, expanding regional AI capabilities and security partnerships in Asia.

title: Quantum computing moving beyond theory into practical applications
snippet: Quantum computing is moving beyond theory into impactful practical applications, from drug discovery to AI systems, with potential societal benefits across multiple industries.

title: Palm Beach State College Takes Aim at Quantum Workforce Demand
snippet: Palm Beach State College establishes Quantum Innovation Center for education, applied research, industry collaboration and workforce development to meet growing quantum computing talent needs.

title: Quantum risk to crypto is advancing, Google paper warns
snippet: Google researchers issue new warning that future quantum computers may be capable of breaking the cryptography that protects Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies, accelerating timeline concerns.
